channel.title: Stanley Solutions Blog - Linux
channel.description: engineering and creativity - all under one hat

item.title: Running VirtualDJ on Linux
item.description: I'm a Linux fan. There's no doubt about that. I've gone so far as to run Virtual DJ software for my mobile DJ work. I use Virtual DJ; I have since I used a free version with my first DJ controller, so I still use it now on Linux.
item.dc:creator: Joe Stanley
